---
title: "Sacred History, selected from the Scriptures, with Annotations and Reflections suited to the Comprehension of Young Minds"
---

## Sacred History, selected from the Scriptures, with Annotations and Reflections suited to the Comprehension of Young Minds

**Author:** Sarah Trimmer
**Date:** 1782-1785
**Imprint:** London: Dodsley

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
